subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of the True One! I hear thou art grieved and distressed at the happenings
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق گفتند از وقایع و حوادث کونی قدری ملول و محزونی و کمی مغموم
subcodes.subjects: @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
